settings.title: Preview confirmed
settings.text: Your order has been placed and your preview locked in. Printing starts within 48 hours.

settings.title: Printed in Quebec
settings.text: Your book is at our printer in Mile-End, Montreal. Typical print + bind time: 2 business days.

settings.title: On its way
settings.text: You'll receive a tracking number by email as soon as the book ships. 5–8 business days in Canada, 7–12 to the US or Europe.

settings.title: Delivered
settings.text: Open it together. Flip to page one. Send us a photo — we love seeing the first read.
